# BRMSTE Open Software — Catalogue

**BRMSTE LTD · [Companies House 15310393](https://find-and-update.company-information.service.gov.uk/company/15310393) · GB2607860**

*Every repository and link on this page resolves live. The list is generated by [`scripts/hydrate.py`](scripts/hydrate.py); see [`STATUS.md`](STATUS.md).*

</div>

---

## How this catalogue is built

This is not a marketing list. It is **hydrated from the GitHub REST API** for the [BRMSTE-SB](https://github.com/BRMSTE-SB) organization and cross-checked against live HTTPS probes. If a repository is archived or a surface stops resolving, the next hydration run removes it.

- Source: `https://api.github.com/orgs/BRMSTE-SB/repos`
- Generator: [`scripts/hydrate.py`](scripts/hydrate.py) → [`open-software/catalog.json`](open-software/catalog.json)
- Probe log: [`open-software/surfaces.json`](open-software/surfaces.json)

---

## Public repositories

### Original

| Repository | Description |
|------------|-------------|
| [`open-gits`](https://github.com/BRMSTE-SB/open-gits) | Human open-git catalog · patent-enforced · meet BRMSTE on the HTTPS edge |
| [`brmste-human-future`](https://github.com/BRMSTE-SB/brmste-human-future) | Run into the future — human starter · keeper poll · no keys · GB2607860 enforced |
| [`mining-pools`](https://github.com/BRMSTE-SB/mining-pools) | BRMSTE LTD enterprise — mining pools |
| [`docs`](https://github.com/BRMSTE-SB/docs) | Organization documentation |

### Forks

| Repository | Description |
|------------|-------------|
| [`mining-pools-1`](https://github.com/BRMSTE-SB/mining-pools-1) | Bitcoin Mining Pools Coinbase Tags |
| [`mining-pool-logos`](https://github.com/BRMSTE-SB/mining-pool-logos) | Mining-pool logo assets |

**6 public repositories** (4 original + 2 forks) at last hydration.

```bash
git clone https://github.com/BRMSTE-SB/open-gits.git
git clone https://github.com/BRMSTE-SB/brmste-human-future.git
git clone https://github.com/BRMSTE-SB/mining-pools.git
```

## Live product surfaces

Verified `200` at last hydration:

| Surface | URL |
|---------|-----|
| BRMSTE site | [brmste.com](https://brmste.com/) |
| Edge Glass | [brmste.com/edge-glass](https://brmste.com/edge-glass/) |
| Edge Glass (brmste.ai) | [brmste.ai](https://brmste.ai/) |
| Companies House | [registry 15310393](https://find-and-update.company-information.service.gov.uk/company/15310393) |
| On-chain reserve | [mempool.space](https://mempool.space/address/bc1qkqy9tna45dl3fhknpvmlpx2a044a95h5lza77d) |
| GitHub Enterprise | [enterprises/brmste-ltd](https://github.com/enterprises/brmste-ltd) |

> Surfaces that do **not** resolve (several `*.json` "substrate" endpoints) are recorded in [`open-software/surfaces.json`](open-software/surfaces.json) with their real HTTP status and are deliberately **not** listed here.

---

## Licence — Human Open terms

Governed by the [BRMSTE Patent Notice](PATENT-NOTICE.md):

- **Humans** may **clone, read, fork, and run** at **zero marginal cost**, provided the patent notice is preserved in derivatives.
- **AI and commercial operators** must hold a BRMSTE licence before any wallet, seed, sign, or compete lane.
- Granted patent **GB2607860 · PCT/GB2026/050406**; beneficiary **Dimpy Bansal · Dimpy Bansal Trust**; operator **Shravan Bansal · BRMSTE LTD**.

To carry BRMSTE open software downstream, drop [`PATENT-NOTICE-TEMPLATE.md`](PATENT-NOTICE-TEMPLATE.md) into your fork and keep the canonical marks defined in [`BRAND.md`](BRAND.md).
